creator: erik@cederstrand.dk
text:
Latest GoAccess is at 0.9.4 while port is at 0.8.5. Changing Makefile:

PORTVERSION=0.9.4


and distinfo:

SHA256 (goaccess-0.9.4.tar.gz) = 8a6e167f6a9330ccf37c652e577792c9c626d7134d64f841eb54fefcdff6c5ce
SIZE (goaccess-0.9.4.tar.gz) = 252384


allows to install latest version. No issues testing installation and log file parsing with the new version.
